title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!
